description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and shed-style roof combination, featuring clean geometric lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The exterior is finished in a mix of white and dark wood paneling, with large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto spacious decks and patios. The house is surrounded by several mature trees and landscaped areas, enhancing its integration with the environment. The upper floor includes a rooftop terrace with railings, while the ground floor boasts expansive outdoor living spaces furnished for relaxation and dining. The main entryway is defined by a paved walkway leading to a recessed door beneath the overhanging roof. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, natural light, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with flat and shed roofs, large glass windows, wood and white paneling, and spacious outdoor decks surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, paved walkway, and a mix of white and dark wood exterior with trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large glass windows, upper terrace, and an extended wooden deck with outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio, sliding glass doors, and a combination of flat and sloped roof sections.
description_view_3: Top-down angled view emphasizing the rooftop terrace, overhanging shed roof, and the arrangement of outdoor living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door accessed by a paved walkway, sheltered by an overhanging shed roof, with minimal decorative elements.
